title: event name prefixes
manager: Allow events to carry a dotted prefix — `door.open`, `ui.click` — so related events can be grouped and matched by namespace instead of living in one flat pile of names. On top of declared alphabets it gives the author a lightweight way to organize a machine's event vocabulary and opens the door to prefix-based matching in transitions.
cs: namespacing over the declared event alphabet (W7.2); enables prefix-based transition matching; verify the split against the channel spec so it doesn't overlap the alphabet declaration.
